## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened.

## Environment

- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 125]
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14]
- Wallet: [e.g. Freighter 5.x]
- Network: [TESTNET / MAINNET]

## Screenshots / console errors

If applicable, add screenshots or paste console output here.
